info.name: Stockone
info.description:
The Stockone REST API comprises API definitions for different business operations, which would involve many steps in the process of Order Fulfilment, Vendor Management and Sales & Purchases. The core structures **request** and **response** form the basis for each API.

## Security

The REST API service is protected to allow only authorized access. Stockone relies on the industry-standard [OAuth 2.0](http://oauth.net/2/) protocol for granting access, due to its simplicity and ease of implementation.

API Key and Secret are required to generate Access Token and the same will be shared for your account on written request to [support@stockone.com](mailto:support@stockone.com)

item.name: Neo

request.description: Stockone offers programmatic access tokens that are valid for a fixed length of time. By default, access tokens are valid for 24 hours. The user must re-authorise when access tokens expire.

Create Advance Shipment Notice (ASN) for Purchase Orders (PO).

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| warehouse | Warehouse ID where the grn entry needs to be created | string | Yes |
| po_number | PO Number used to create grn entries for that particular Purchase Order | string | Yes |
| supplier_id | Supplier ID for whom this grn needs to be mapped | string | No |
| grn_type | Goods Receipt Note Type | string | Yes |
| extra_fields | ASN Extra Attributes Defined | dict | No |
| asn_reference | ASN Reference Number | string | No |
| invoice_number | Invoice Number | string | No |
| invoice_date | Invoice Date | string | No |
| invoice_value | Invoice Value | Float | No |

## Items

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| sku_code | SKU Code of the item | string | Yes |
| po_quantity | PO Quantity of Item | float | No |
| invoice_quantity | Invoice Quantity | float | Yes |
| invoice_free_quantity | Invoice Free Quantity | float | Yes |
| received_quantity | Received Quantity | float | Yes |
| accepted_quantity | Accepted Quantity | float | Yes |
| rejected_quantity | Rejected Quantity | float | No |
| po_price | PO Price if we have multiple line Refernces | float | No |
| buy_price | Buy Price | float | No |
| batch_number | Batch Number Mandatory for Batch Based SKUs | string | No |
| manufactured_date | Batch MFG Date Mandatory for Batch Based SKUs | string | No |
| expiry_date | Batch EXP Date Mandatory for Batch Based SKUs | string | No |
| vendon_batch_number | Vendors Batch Number | string | No |
| aux_data | Extra Data | dict | No |
| serial_numbers | List of serial numbers to create | list | No |

API to create customers in Stockone

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required | Valid data |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| warehouse | Warehouse ID where return is being processed | string | Yes |  |
| customer_reference | Unique Reference for the customer | string | Yes |  |
| name | Customer name (Length should be below 255 characters) | string | Yes |  |
| shipping_address | Shipping address of the customer | string | Yes |  |
| tax_type | Tax_type of the customer | string | Yes | Intra State/ Inter State |
| status | status of the customer | string | Yes |  |
| customer_type | Type of Customer | string | Yes | External/Stock Transfer/Others |
| city | City of the customer (Length should be below 127 characters) | string | No |  |
| state | State of the customer (Length should be below 64 characters | string | No |  |
| pincode | Pincode of the customer | string | No |  |
| gstin_number | GST number of Customer | string | No |  |
| phone_number | Phone number of Customer | string | No |  |
| pan_number | Pan Number of Customer | string | No |  |
| customer_code | Customer code | string | No |  |
| last_name | Customer Last name | string | No |  |
| country | Customer country | string | No |  |
| tcs | tcs | string | No |  |
| latitude | Latitude | string | No |  |
| longitude | Longitude | string | No |  |
| email_id | email id of the Customer | string | No |  |
| credit_period | Credit Period | int | No |  |
| discount_percentage | Discount Percentage | float | No |  |
| spoc_name | Name of the SPOC | string | No |  |
| tcs_percentage | tcs Percentage value | float | No |  |
| price_list | price type | string | No |  |
| markup | Markup value | float | No |  |
| customer_shelf_life | Shelf life of Customer | float | No |  |
| json_data | For passing additional info | string | No |  |
| customer_aux_info | customer_aux_info | string | No |  |

Updated on: 25 March 2024

item.name: Goods Receipt Note(GRN)

request.description:
Create Goods Receipt Note (GRN) for Purchase Orders (PO).

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| warehouse | Warehouse ID where the GRN entry needs to be created | string | Yes |
| po_number | PO Number used to create GRN entries for that particular Purchase Order | string | Yes |
| supplier_id | Supplier ID for whom this GRN needs to be mapped | string | No |
| grn_type | Goods Receipt Note Type | string | Yes |
| extra_fields | GRN Extra Attributes Defined | dict | No |
| grn_reference | GRN Reference Number | string | No |
| invoice_number | Invoice Number | string | No |
| invoice_date | Invoice Date | string | No |
| invoice_value | Invoice Value | Float | No |
| additional_cost | Additional cost Value | Float | No |
| discount_amount | Discount Amount Value | Float | No |

## Items

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| sku_code | SKU Code of the item | string | Yes |
| id | PO Internal ID | int | Yes |
| po_id | PO Internal ID | int | Yes |
| asn_id | ASN Internal ID | int | Yes |
| po_number | PO Number of the item | string | Yes |
| po_quantity | PO Quantity of Item | float | No |
| invoice_quantity | Invoice Quantity | float | Yes |
| invoice_free_quantity | Invoice Free Quantity | float | Yes |
| received_quantity | Received Quantity | float | Yes |
| accepted_quantity | Accepted Quantity | float | Yes |
| rejected_quantity | Rejected Quantity | float | No |
| po_price | PO Price if we have multiple line References | float | No |
| buy_price | Buy Price | float | No |
| total_amount | Amount | float | No |
| tax | Tax Percent | float | No |
| igst_tax | igst tax Percent | float | No |
| cgst_tax | cgst tax Percent | float | No |
| sgst_tax | sgst tax Percent | float | No |
| cess_tax | cess tax Percent | float | No |
| batch_number | Batch Number Mandatory for Batch Based SKUs | string | No |
| manufactured_date | Batch MFG Date Mandatory for Batch Based SKUs | string | No |
| expiry_date | Batch EXP Date Mandatory for Batch Based SKUs | string | No |
| vendon_batch_number | Vendors Batch Number | string | No |
| aux_data | Extra Data | dict | No |
| serial_numbers | List of serial numbers to create | list | No |
| accepted_serial_numbers | List of Accepted serial numbers to create | list | No |
| rejected_serial_numbers | List of Rejected serial numbers to create | list | No |
| lpns | LPN Data | list | No |

request.description:
The API can be used to either create a single order or you can batch multiple orders in a single api call. Current maximum batch size supported is 50. Orders can contain single item or multiple items.

## **Request Payload**

## **Header(Required)**

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Warehouse | Warehouse name where the order entry needs to be created. Warehouse name should match the warehouse name created in Stockone | String | Yes |

## **Top Level Fields (Required)**

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| order_type | Order Type. Allowed order types are 'express' and 'slot' | String | Yes |
| order_reference | Order Unique Identification Number | String | Yes |
| department_name(Internal Issuance) | Department Name is mandatory for I**nternal Issuance** as order type which should be configured in Stockone | String | Yes |

## **Customer (Required)**

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| customer_reference | Customer Reference for whom this order needs to be mapped | String | Yes |

## **Items (Required)**

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| sku | SKU code of the item | String | Yes |
| quantity | Number of items | int/float | Yes |
| sale price | Selling Price for the SKU ( Without Tax ) | float | Yes |
| mrp | Max Retail Price for the SKU | float | No |

### **Tax Details ( Optional )**

Should contain the details of Tax details of item for the order.

| **Tax Name** | **Description** | **Format** | **Required** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| cgst_tax | CGST Tax | float | No |
| sgst_tax | SGST Tax | float | No |
| igst_tax | IGST Tax | float | No |
| cess_tax | CESS Tax | float | No |

### **Extra Charges ( Optional )**

Should contain the details of about the extra charges for the order.

| **Field Name** | **Description** | **Format** | **Required** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| name | Name of the charge | string | No |
| amount | charge amount ( without tax ) | float | No |
| tax_amount | tax_amount to be added to the amount | float | No |

Used to the status of the order

| **Field Name** | **Description** | **Format** | **Required** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| warehouse | Warehouse Username | string | yes |
| order_id | Order Id | string | yes |
| order_reference | Order Reference | string | yes |
| status | Status | string | yes |

request.description:
Product API offers flexibility to create a SKU with very few details to elaborative details as per the requirement. The same API allows modifying the existing product(SKU) details by passing the SKU code as input.

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| warehouse | Warehouse ID where the product is to be created | string | Yes |
| sku_code | Unique code of the product | string | Yes |
| sku_desc | Name/ description of the product | string | No |
| sku_reference | Reference code for the product | string | No |
| sku_brand | Brand name of the product | string | No |
| zone_id | Putzone of the product | string | No |
| sku_category_name | Category of the product | string |  |
| sku_type | Product Type. Values accepted are 'RM', 'FG', 'CS', 'Expense','WIP' | String | No |
| price | Unit Price of the product | float | No |
| mrp | MRP of the product | float | No |
| cost_price | Cost price of the product | float | No |
| hsn_code | HSN code of the product | string | No |
| image_url | Image URL of the sku. It should be full URL | string | No |
| threshold_quantity | Threshold quantity of the product for raising the auto purchase order | string | No |
| status | Status of the sku active/inactive. Enums are 0 and 1. 0 means inactive, 1 means active. | boolean | No |
| scan_picking | Allow EAN scan for SKU. Values allowed are 'Non-scanable' or 'Scanable' | string | No |
| tax_type | Name of the tax that should be mapped to the product. You can get available tax types from Tax Master API | string | No |
| customer_shelf_life | Customer shelf life of the SKU | int | No |
| product_shelf_life | shelf life of the SKU | int | No |
| minimum_shelf_life | Minimum shelf life of the SKU | int | No |
| make_or_buy | Indicates whether the SKU is made in the warehouse or bought for the warehouse. Values accepted are 'default','make','buy' | string | No |
| serialized | Indicates whether the SKU is a serialized SKU or normal SKU. Values accepted are 'enable' and 'disable' | string | No |
| batch_based | Indicates whether the SKU is batch_based, values accepted are true and false | Boolean(ex: true/false) | No |
| ean_number | EAN numbers for the product. If multiple ean number needs to be mapped to a single product then they can be passed a list of strings "0987654,2322323" | string | No |

**Last Updated** : 06-06-2024

request.description:
Products API helps in retrieving the product list by the warehouse. It is expected to pass the warehouse ID for which the products list is required in the warehouse level. API response included the complete metadata of the product (SKU). Products API supports pagination as the products list can be vast. Default limit is 10.

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| warehouse | Name of the Warehouse | string | Yes |
| sku_code | SKU Code | string | Yes |
| limit | Limit for pagination | int | No |
| pagenum | Page number according to limit | int | No |

**Last Updated:** 06-06-2024

request.description:
Create Purchase Order (PO)

# **Header Fields**

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| supplier_id | Supplier ID for whom this purchase order needs to be mapped | string | yes |
| supplier_reference | Supplier Reference | string | No |
| create_supplier | Create Supplier Master if Supplier Reference is Passed | bool | No |
| supplier_name | Name of the Supplier | string | No |
| supplier_phone | Supplier Phone No | string | No |
| supplier_email | Supplier Email ID | string | No |
| supplier_tin | Supplier GST Number | string | No |
| supplier_address | Supplier Address | string | No |
| create_supplier_attributes | Create Supplier Master Extra Attributes if supplier_extra_fields is Passed | bool | No |
| supplier_extra_fields | Supplier Extra Attributes Defined | dict | No |
| po_delivery_date | Purchase Order Delivery Date | string, MM/DD/YYYY HH:MM | No |
| ship_to | Warehouse Address | string | No |
| po_reference | Purchase Order Unique Identification number | string | No |
| extra_fields | PO Extra Attributes Defined | dict | No |

# **Item Fields**

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| sku | SKU Code of the item | string | Yes |
| order_quantity | Quantity of Item | string | Yes |
| free_quantity | Po Free Quantity | string | No |
| measurement_unit | measurment_unit Of Item | string | No |
| price | price of Item (price must less than MRP) | Int | No |
| MRP | MRP of Item | Int | No |
| sgst_tax | sgst_tax of Item | Int | No |
| cgst_tax | cgst_tax of Item | Int | No |
| igst_tax | igst_tax of Item | Int | No |
| utgst_tax | utgst_tax of Item | Int | No |
| cess_tax | cess_tax of Item | Int | No |
| apmc_tax | apmc_tax of Item | Int | No |
| line_extra_fields | PO SKU Line Extra Attributes Defined | dict | No |
| aux_data | Extra Data | dict | No |

This API allows fetching detailed invoice data with filtering options based on date, order type, and other attributes.

## Update Invoice Data

This API updates invoice data with additional details such as invoice reference, URL, and encoded invoice information.

## **Endpoint**

\`\`\`  
PUT {{BASE_URL}}/api/v1/outbound/invoice/

\`\`\`

### **Headers (Required)**

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Warehouse | Warehouse name where the invoices are created | String | Yes |
| Authorization | Authentication token | String | Yes |
| Content-Type | Data format type | application/json | Yes |

## **Request Body (JSON Array)**

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| invoice_number | Unique Invoice Number | String | Yes |
| invoice_reference | Invoice Reference ID | String | Yes |
| invoice_url | URL for invoice document | String (URL) | Yes |
| order_reference | Related Order Reference | String | Yes |
| encoded_invoice | Base64 encoded invoice document | String (Base64) | Yes |

## **cURL Request Example**

curl --location --request PUT '[http://localhost:8081/api/v1/outbound/invoice/](http://localhost:8081/api/v1/outbound/invoice/)' \\

item.description: The Stockone REST API comprises API definitions for different business operations, which would involve many steps in the process of Order Fulfilment, Vendor Management and Sales & Purchases. The core structures **request** and **response** form the basis for each API.\\n\\n## Security\\n\\nThe REST API service is protected to allow only authorized access. Stockone relies on the industry-standard \[OAuth 2.0\]([http://oauth.net/2/](http://oauth.net/2/)) protocol for granting access, due to its simplicity and ease of implementation.\\n\\nAPI Key and Secret are required to generate Access Token and the same will be shared for your account on written request to \[[support@stockone.com](https://mailto:support@stockone.com)\](mailto:[support@stockone.com](https://mailto:support@stockone.com))

API to update the details of customer which is already in existence in stockone

**Example callback endpoint -** [http://test.stockone.com/api/orderUpdate](http://test.stockone.com/api/orderUpdate)

**Order Update callback will be triggered in the following scenarios:**

1.  On Order Creation
2.  On Order Cancellation
3.  After Picklist Generation
4.  When Picklist Cancelled
5.  After Invoice Generation
    

## **ORDER STATUS:**

| **Order Status** | **Description** |
| --- | --- |
| open | Open Orders that are yet to be processed. |
| in_progress | When Picking started. |
| picked | When the order is picked. |
| invoiced | When order packed and invoiced. |
| dispatched | When the package leaves warehouse |
| cancelled | When the order is cancelled. |

## **SKU status:**

| **SKU Status** | **Description** |
| --- | --- |
| open | When items are yet to be picked. |
| in_progress | When Picking Started |
| fulfilled | When item quantity is completely fulfilled |
| unfulfilled | When item is unavailable and the quantity is completely unfulfilled. |
| partial_fulfilled | When item quantity is partially fulfilled. |
| cancelled | When the order is cancelled. |

**Last Updated on**: 09-01-2023

request.description:
Provides mechanism to track inventory changes

**Inventory Update callback will be triggered in the following scenarios :**

1.  After Putaway is done
2.  After inventory adjustment
3.  After move inventory
4.  After Return Putaway
5.  After Picklist Generation
6.  After Picklist Confirmation
7.  After Order is Cancelled
8.  After Picklist Delete
9.  After Order Updated
    

**Response Fields**

| **Field** | **Description** |
| --- | --- |
| total_quantity | Total quantity available at the warehouse |
| open_order_quantity | Quantity in open orders ( Before Picklist Generation ) |
| reserved_quantity | Quantity that is reserved for picking |
| available_quantity | (Total - (Open + Reserved) ) |

**Last Updated on** : 25-08-2022

request.description:
The API can be used to either create a single order or you can batch multiple orders in a single api call. Current maximum batch size supported is 50. Orders can contain single item or multiple items.

## **Request Payload**

### **Top Level Fields ( Required )**

| **Field Name** | **Description** | **Format** | **Required** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| warehouse | Warehouse ID where the order entry needs to be created. Warehouse ID should match the warehouse id created in Stockone | string | Yes |
| order_type | Order Type. Allowed order types are 'express' and 'slot' | string | Yes |
| order_reference | Order Unique Identification number | string | Yes |
| promised_time | Promised or Estimated Time of Arrival ( ETA ) for Order Delivery | datetime | No |
| slot_from | Slot starting time for scheduled delivery | datetime | No |
| slot_to | Slot ending time for scheduled delivery | datetime | No |
| sku_check | Allowed values are 'true' and 'false'. If 'false', the sku (item ) which does not have an entry in stockone system will be removed from the payload and an order entry will be created with rest of the items | string | No |

### **Customer ( Required )**

Should contain the details of the customer for the order.

| **Field Name** | **Description** | **Format** | **Required** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| customer_name | Name of the Customer | string | Yes |
| customer_reference | Customer ID for whom this order needs to be mapped | string | Yes |

### **Items ( Required )**

Should contain the details of the items in the order. One of the fields among sale_price and sale_price_gst is mandatory.

| **Field Name** | **Description** | **Format** | **Required** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| sku | SKU code of the item | string | Yes |
| quantity | Number of items | int/float | Yes |
| sale_price | Selling Price for the SKU ( Without Tax ) | float | Yes |
| sale_price_gst | Selling Price for the SKU ( With Tax ) | float | Yes |
| mrp | Max Retail Price for the SKU | float | No |

### **Extra Charges ( Optional )**

Should contain the details of about the extra charges for the order.

| **Field Name** | **Description** | **Format** | **Required** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| name | Name of the charge | string | No |
| amount | charge amount ( without tax ) | float | No |
| tax_amount | tax_amount to be added to amount | float | No |

**Last Updated on** : 08-11-2022

request.description:
Helps in retrieving the orders

## Filters available

| **Field Name** | **Description** | **Format** | **Required** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| warehouse | Warehouse id for which the query is being made | string | yes |
| order_id | Order id that was returned when order was created in stockone system | string | no |
| order_reference | Order Reference that was provided while creating the order | string | no |
| customer_id | Customer Id | string | no |
| from_date | From Date | date | no |
| to_date | To Date | date | no |
| limit | Limit | int | no |

## **Order status:**

| **Order Status** | **Description** |
| --- | --- |
| open | Open Orders that are yet to be processed. |
| in_progress | When Picking started. |
| picked | When the order is picked. |
| invoiced | When order packed and invoiced. |
| dispatched | When the package leaves warehouse |
| cancelled | When the order is cancelled. |

## **SKU status:**

| **SKU Status** | **Description** |
| --- | --- |
| open | When items are yet to be picked. |
| in_progress | When Picking Started |
| fulfilled | When item quantity is completely fulfilled |
| unfulfilled | When item is unavailable and the quantity is completely unfulfilled. |
| partial_fulfilled | When item quantity is partially fulfilled. |
| cancelled | When the order is cancelled. |

request.description:
Products API helps in retrieving the product list by the warehouse. It is expected to pass the warehouse ID for which the products list is required in the warehouse level. API response included the complete metadata of the product (SKU). Products API supports pagination as the products list can be vast. Default limit is 10

| **Field Name** | **Description** | **Format** | **Required** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| warehouse | Warehouse Username | string | yes |
| sku_code | SKU Code | string | yes |
| limit | Limit for pagination | int | no |
| page_num | Page number according to limit | int | no |

request.description:
Product API offers flexibility to create a SKU with very few details to elaborative details as per the requirement. The same API allows modifying the existing product(SKU) details by passing the SKU code as input.

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| warehouse | Warehouse ID where the product is to be created | string | Yes |
| sku_code | Unique code of the product | string | Yes |
| sku_desc | Name/ description of the product | string | No |
| sku_reference | Reference code for the product | string | No |
| sku_brand | Brand name of the product | string | No |
| sku_category_name | Category of the product | string | No |
| sku_type | Product Type. Values accepted are 'RM', 'FG', 'CS', 'Expense','WIP' | string | No |
| price | Unit Price of the product | float | No |
| mrp | MRP of the product | float | No |
| cost_price | Cost price of the product | float | No |
| hsn_code | HSN code of the product | string | No |
| image_url | Image URL of the sku. It should be full URL | string | No |
| threshold_quantity | Threshold quantity of the product for raising the auto purchase order | string | No |
| status | Status of the sku active/inactive. Enums are 0 and 1. 0 means inactive, 1 means active. | boolean | No |
| scan_picking | Allow EAN scan for SKU. Values allowed are 'Non-scanable' or 'Scanable' | string | No |
| tax_type | Name of the tax that should be mapped to the product. You can get available tax types from Tax Master API | string | No |
| customer_shelf_life | Customer shelf life of the SKU | int | No |
| product_shelf_life | shelf life of the SKU | int | No |
| minimum_shelf_life | Minimum shelf life of the SKU | int | No |
| make_or_buy | Indicates whether the SKU is made in the warehouse or bought for the warehouse. Values accepted are 'default','make','buy' | string | No |
| serialized | Indicates whether the SKU is a serialized SKU or normal SKU. Values accepted are 'enable' and 'disable' | string | No |
| batch_based | Indicates whether the SKU is batch_based, values accepted are true and false | Boolean(ex: true/false) | No |

**Last Updated** : 18-11-2022

request.description:
Create Purchase Order (PO)

## Request Payload

### Top Level Fields ( Required )

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| warehouse | Warehouse ID where the purchase order entry needs to be created | string | yes |
| supplier_id | Supplier ID for whom this purchase order needs to be mapped | string | yes |
| supplier_reference | Supplier Reference | string | no |
| ship_to | Warehouse Address | string | no |
| po_reference | Purchase Order Unique Identification number | string | yes |
| supplier_name | Name of the Supplier | string | no |
| po_delivery_date | Purchase Order Delivery Date | string | no |
| extra_fields | PO Custom Fields | json | no |

**Note**:

1. If Supplier Id Invalid then Supplier Reference Mandatory to create supplier
    

2\. For Existing Supplier supplier Id or supplier reference mandatory to create PO

3\. Configured custom fields can be passed using **'extra_fields'** field.

### Items ( Required )

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| sku | SKU Code of the item | string | yes |
| order_quantity | Quantity of Item | Int | yes |
| measurement_unit | measurment_unit Of Item | string | no |
| price | price of Item (price must less than MRP) | Int | no |
| MRP | MRP of Item | Int | no |
| sgst_tax | sgst_tax of Item | Int | no |
| cgst_tax | cgst_tax of Item | Int | no |
| igst_tax | igst_tax of Item | Int | no |
| utgst_tax | utgst_tax of Item | Int | no |
| cess_tax | cess_tax of Item | Int | no |
| apmc_tax | apmc_tax of Item | Int | no |
| aux_data | Auxiliary Data | json | no |

request.description:
Retrieve PO details of raised PO's .

## Filters Available

| **Field Name** | **Description** | **Format** | **Required** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| warehouse | Warehouse Username | string | yes |
| po_number | Purchase Order Number | string | yes |
| from_date | From Date | date | no |
| to_date | To Date | date | no |
| limit | Limit | int | no |
| status | PO Status | string | no |

**Purchase Order Header Level Status:**

| **PO Status** | **Description** |
| --- | --- |
| Open | Open PO's that are yet to be received |
| Received | when PO is fully received or short closed |
| Cancelled | when PO is cancelled |
| Partially Received | when PO is partially received |

**Purchase Order SKU Level Status:**

| **SKU Status** | **Description** |
| --- | --- |
| Open | when Item is yet to be received. |
| Received | when Item is completely received or short closed |
| Cancelled | when Item is completely cancelled. |
| Partially Received | when Item is partially received. |

| **Field Name** | **Description** | **Format** | **Required** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| warehouse | Warehouse Name | string | yes |
| status | Status | string | yes |
| po_number | Purchase Order Number | string | yes |
| po_reference | Purchase Order Reference | string | yes |
| reason | Cancelled Reason | string | yes |

| Field Name | Description | Format | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| warehouse | Warehouse Name | string | yes |
| from_date | Retrieve data from date | Date format (yyyy-mm-dd) | yes |
| to_date | Retrieve data to date | Date format (yyyy-mm-dd) | no |
| po_number | Purchase Order Number | string | no |
| grn_number | GRN Number | string | no |
| sku_code | SKU Code | string | no |
| sku_category | SKU Category | string | no |
| receipt_type | Receipt Type (return/Self Receipt/job order/pull_to_locate) | string | no |
| po_reference | PO Reference | string | no |
| limit | Limit no.of data fetched | int | no |

| **Filed Name** | **Description** | **Format** | **Required** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| warehouse | Warehouse Name | string | yes | 
| jo_type | Job order Type | string | yes |
| fg_sku_code | Product SKU code| string | yes |
| fg_sku_quantity | Product SKU quantity | float | yes |
| supplier_id | Supplier Id in case of Returnable JO | string | yes ( In cases of Returnable JO ) | 
| po_reference | Service PO Reference for Returnable JO| string | yes ( In cases of Returnable JO ) | 
| remarks | Remarks regarding  JO | string | no | 

**JO Types**

| **JO Type** | **Description** | **Format** | **Required** |

| Returnable JO | Returnable Job Order | string | yes | 


**Note**

1. BOM should be defined in stockone through BOM API or other means for JO Creation
2. supplier_id and po_reference are mandatory in case of Returnable JO

1. shipment_created
2. manifest_created
3. manifest_closed
4. delivered
5. returns_initiated
6. returns_delivered

If we pass the Eway bill Url, no need to pass the encoded_ewaybill & viceversa.
